ModMetaData.name: Emerald Isle
ModMetaData.author: Patrick Mee
ModMetaData.description:
Emerald Isle is a lore-friendly RimWorld expansion inspired by Irish history, archaeology, material culture, language, and mythology.
Current content: oats, a medium-cycle grain crop; a material-efficient dry-stone wall; a small oat-processing chain using a hand quern to make milled oats, oat porridge, and oat flatbread; a flax-to-linen household textile path with a linen tunic; a central hearth for cooking, heat, light, and household identity; a practical wool-optimal brat cloak; feed-efficient Kerry dairy cattle; and farmhouse cheese for longer unrefrigerated food security.
